name: Read Lattice Data
description: Reads a value from the user's lattice namespace at the given path. Paths use '/' separators (e.g. 'g/my-agent/state', 'g/my-agent/timeline/3', 's/my-secret'). Namespaces: 'g' = agents, 's' = secrets, 'j' = jobs. Path can also be a JSON array for pre-typed keys (e.g. ['g', 'my-agent', 'timeline', 3]). Returns {exists: true, value: <data>} when path has data, or {exists: false, value: null} when path has no data or is invalid.

path.description: Path to read, e.g. 'g/my-agent/state' or ['g', 'my-agent', 'timeline', 3]. Namespaces: g = agents, s = secrets, j = jobs.

exists.description: True if data exists at this path

value.description: The value at the path, or null if not found
